prompt: What requirement or constraint motivated the decision that REPLACED "MCP tool subset env var"? List them.

ground_truth.sparql: SELECT DISTINCT ?s ?title WHERE { GRAPH <https://moosedev.dev/kg/project> { ?old <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> "MCP tool subset env var" . ?head ?sp ?old . FILTER(STRENDS(STR(?sp),"supersedes")) ?head ?mp ?s . FILTER(STRENDS(STR(?mp),"isMotivatedBy")) ?s <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> ?title } }
